$comment: Fixture for task-15: violates ASSET_KIND_MATCH only (plus an unavoidable collateral BLOCK_ROLE_MATCH, since a screen-pattern item has no blockRole facet) — derived from the golden SelectionSpec by swapping invoice-list block role filter-toolbar registryItem from filter-toolbar-01 (block-pattern) to collection-table-01 (screen-pattern).

assumptions: login-03 was the sole auth screen-pattern candidate; its score reflects coverage, not comparison.
risks: Inventory lacks validation-error/error/loading states for the login form (form-section-login-01 risk.missingStates); add before production use.

assumptions: dashboard-01 was the sole dashboard screen-pattern candidate; its score reflects coverage, not comparison.
Shell hard filter passed: sidebar-07 shell 'sidebar' matches dashboard-01 layoutModel.shell; app-shell-topnav excluded via incompatibleWith.
risks: Inventory lacks loading/empty/error/permission-denied variants across all selected dashboard blocks (declared in their risk.missingStates); required by the data-driven-screen rule before production use.
data-table-panel-01 drag-reorder has no keyboard alternative (accessibility risk).

assumptions: collection-table-01 was the sole collection screen-pattern candidate; its score reflects coverage, not comparison (evidence confidence 'medium' scored 5/10, hence 95).
Shell hard filter passed: sidebar-07 shell 'sidebar' matches collection-table-01 layoutModel.shell; app-shell-topnav excluded via incompatibleWith.

Step requiredStates loading/empty/error are rendered at composition level by the screen pattern (skeleton table / Empty / Alert replace the table region); chrome blocks (shell, header, toolbar) persist unchanged across those states, so block-level state scoring is not penalized for them and block-level missingStates are recorded as risks instead.

filter-toolbar-01 evidence confidence 'medium' scored 5/10, hence 95; sidebar-07, page-header-actions-01, data-table-panel-01 are 'high' (10/10). data-table-panel-01 interaction K=3/5 (drag-drop, drawer-inspection are off-role), hence 94 - same as dry-run #1.
risks: collection-table-01 lacks permission-denied and rtl coverage (risk.missingStates); the data-driven-screen rule requires permission-denied before production use.
Block items themselves declare only default/mobile/dark-mode stateCoverage; loading/empty/error exist only at the screen-pattern composition level.
loading/empty/error are simulated via the ?state= query param against a static JSON fixture, not real network conditions (collection-table-01 risk notes).
data-table-panel-01 drag-reorder has no keyboard alternative (accessibility risk, carried from dry-run #1).
